summary: Dashboard renders in mobile narrow viewport with basic functionality intact, but violates brand palette consistency by using generic neutral gray/white UI instead of the required diner aesthetic. The error state handling appears functional with proper layout structure.

violations.description: Logged-in dashboard surface uses generic white/gray neutral palette instead of required diner brand treatment. Background appears white instead of cream (#fff8ea), lacks diner teal accents, and creates brand discontinuity from public surfaces.
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces. Should use cream (#fff8ea) for cards/surfaces rather than generic white backgrounds.

Authenticated app chrome bleeds generic neutral styling instead of maintaining visual separation from public marketing palette. The two style systems should remain distinct but both should follow diner aesthetic.

actions: Apply diner palette to authenticated surfaces - use cream (#fff8ea) for card backgrounds and primary surfaces
Ensure consistent brand treatment between public and logged-in routes while maintaining visual separation
Replace generic white/gray neutral backgrounds with appropriate diner palette colors
Verify mobile narrow layout preserves diner brand identity at 390px viewport
